charter.phase_name: V1.12AZ CPO Bounded Training Layer Extension
charter.mission: Extend the bounded training-facing layer from the original 7-row core skeleton to a 10-row core-plus-guarded-branch layer without opening formal training or signal rights.
in_scope: add only the three guarded branch rows admitted by V1.12AY
keep connector/MPO branch out of the training-facing layer
preserve guarded posture on the added branch rows
success_criteria: a 10-row bounded training-facing layer can be assembled cleanly
the branch addition remains explicitly guarded
the next lawful move becomes a readiness question instead of another admission review

interpretation: V1.12AZ does not widen beyond the three already-admitted branch rows.
This remains bounded, report-only, and non-deployable.
